create_post.hashtag_tip: Hashtags are detected before posting and power the trending system.
create_post.add_tags_example: Add tags in your text like #design or #frontend.

right_panel.ui_design_desc: Explore the latest trends in glassmorphism, neo-brutalism, and spatial interfaces.
right_panel.no_friends_online: You don't have any friends online right now. They will appear here when they connect!

feed.no_posts: No posts yet. Be the first to share something!

post.no_comments: No comments yet. Be the first!

login.in_use: This email is already in use.
login.weak: Password must be at least 6 characters.
login.google_closed: Google sign-in was closed before it finished.
login.too_many: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
login.unauthorized_domain: This domain is not yet authorized in Firebase. Add the current domain to the authorized domains in the Firebase console.
login.subtitle_login: Log in to continue to the feed, communities, and relevant connections.
login.subtitle_create: Start for free and discover a more elegant, organized, and useful social network.
login.google_desc: Quick access, simple account creation, and one-click Google login.
login.reset_needs_email: Enter your email to recover your password.
login.reset_sent: We sent you an email to reset your password.

gate.title: Read and agree to our rules
gate.subtitle_update: The rules for {{name}} have been updated.
gate.subtitle_join: Before you can participate in {{name}}, we ask that you read and agree to our community guidelines.
gate.no_rules: No specific rules defined. Please use common sense.
gate.agree: I have read and agree to the rules of {{name}}. I understand that violating these rules may result in my removal from the community.
gate.error: Failed to process acceptance. Please try again.

explore_page.title: Explore

explore_page.subtitle: Discover what's happening in Aura

notifications_page.title: Notifications
notifications_page.subtitle: Stay updated with your community
notifications_page.empty_desc: When people interact with you or your posts, you'll see it here.

settings_page.title: Settings
settings_page.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences
settings_page.public_profile_desc: Allow anyone to see your profile and posts
settings_page.direct_messages_desc: Allow people you don't follow to message you
settings_page.activity_status_desc: Show when you're active on Aura
settings_page.who_can_request_desc: Control who is allowed to initiate friendship with you.
settings_page.who_can_message_desc: Route unexpected conversations away from your main inbox.
settings_page.who_can_invite: Who can invite me to communities
settings_page.who_can_invite_desc: Keep community invites useful instead of noisy.
settings_page.who_can_see_friends_posts: Who can see my friends-only posts
settings_page.who_can_see_friends_posts_desc: Use a tighter audience for personal content.
settings_page.who_can_see_friend_list: Who can see my friend list
settings_page.who_can_see_friend_list_desc: Hide your social graph if you want a quieter profile.
settings_page.allow_msg_in_requests: Allow a message in friend requests
settings_page.allow_msg_in_requests_desc: People can add short context when requesting friendship.
settings_page.show_mutual_desc: Use shared context to improve suggestions and trust.
settings_page.focus_mode_desc: Hide sidebars and distractions for a cleaner experience

profile_page.default_bio: Exploring the digital frontier. Passionate about design, technology, and building communities. 🚀
profile_page.no_posts_desc: When there are posts, they will show up here.

network_page.title: Network
network_page.subtitle: Grow your professional circle
network_page.search_placeholder: Search people by name or interest...
network_page.friend_requests_desc: Respond quickly to people who already share context with you.
network_page.optional_message: Optional message for this friend request:
network_page.no_suggestions_desc: Try expanding your interests or joining more communities to find relevant connections.
